message:
build(deps): bump clap, serde_json, json5, sysinfo, toml, swc and add crc32c

Update 12+ dependencies to newer versions:
- clap 4.5.58 → 4.5.60 (CLI parser bug fixes)
- serde_json: enable raw_value feature for zero-copy JSON segment handling
- json5 0.4.1 → 1.3.1 (major version bump, expanded spec compliance)
- anyhow 1.0.101 → 1.0.102
- sysinfo 0.38.1 → 0.38.2 (process info perf fixes)
- toml 1.0.1 → 1.0.3
- swc_ecma_parser/visit/ast version bumps for TypeScript transform compat
- Add crc32c 0.6 for frame-level checksum verification in session store v2

The raw_value feature on serde_json is needed by session_store_v2 to avoid
re-serializing payload JSON when writing segment frames — the payload is
kept as a borrowed RawValue slice through the write path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
